source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/14_신뢰성/Reliability Test Result Report (F1417MCW).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Reliability test result report for F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, reporting PASS results for environmental, image capture, power on/off, and aging tests.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design and development verification and validation evidence for product durability and reliability testing.
keyPoints: Final Result is reported as PASS.
Test model is F1417MCW, Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Test step is shown as EVT in the summary and Developmental Evaluation in detailed test sheets.
Heat Resistance Test result is Pass after 30 cycles, with temperature condition inconsistently shown as -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ and -20℃ ⇔ 60℃.
High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test result is Pass under 55℃ / 95% for 240 hr.
Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test result is Pass for 500 cycles.
Power On/Off Test result is Pass for 500 cycles.
Aging Test result is Pass for 24 hr with more than 1000 image acquisitions.

evidence.claim: The device is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL NAME Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The overall reliability test final result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Reliability Test Result Report ... Final Result (최종결과) ... PASS

evidence.claim: The reported test time for the reliability report is 10/11 to 10/31.
The summary test step is EVT.
Detailed test sheets identify the test step as Developmental Evaluation.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL F1417MCW Test Step Developmental Evaluation

evidence.claim: Heat Resistance Test passed after 30 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Category Heat Resistance Test Cycle(30cycle) Result Pass

evidence.claim: Heat Resistance Test reported no failure on appearance and images under -20℃ ⇔ 60℃ in 30 Cycle.
evidence.evidenceText: No Failure on appearance and images under -20℃ ⇔ 60℃ in 30Cycle

evidence.claim: The summary lists Heat Resistance Test condition as -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ for 30 Cycle.
IEC60068-2-78 is listed as an applied standard.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Condition and Standard [Applied Standard: IEC60068-2-78]

evidence.claim: High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test passed under 55℃ / 95% for 240 hr.
evidence.evidenceText: No failure on appearance and images under 55℃ / 95% 240hr

evidence.claim: Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test passed for 500 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: No failure in Repetitive Bright Capture 500 Cycle Pass

evidence.claim: Power On/Off Test passed for 500 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: Power on -> Dark image capture -> Power off (500 Cycle) Pass

evidence.claim: Aging Test passed for 24 hr with more than 1000 image acquisitions.
evidence.evidenceText: Aging시(24HR) : More than 1000 image acquisition) Pass

evidence.claim: No failure improvement was reported in the overall reliability report.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is incomplete: only month/day ranges such as 10/11 ~ 10/31 are present, with no year.
Authority or jurisdiction is not identified in the source text.
Heat Resistance Test temperature condition conflicts between summary (-20℃ ⇔ 70℃) and detailed result (-20℃ ⇔ 60℃).
Source text appears OCR-derived with typos and truncated headings, including '3nd', 'Befere Testing', 'Test Metho', and 'Test Resul'.
Revision/version appears to be the form identifier AIF 801-10-4 (REV.00), not necessarily the document revision.
